title: synth_gatemate output netlist incompatible with Gatemate PnR
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.42+15 (git sha1 dd9624444, g++ 11.4.0-1ubuntu1~22.04 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Head over [here](https://github.com/chili-chips-ba/openCologne/tree/main/8.StressTest/1.corescore_cc) and follow the build steps. The issue is highlighted in the build steps.

### Expected Behavior

The netlist shouldn't contain anything other than Cologne primitives and synthesizable elements. Take a look at this [issue](https://github.com/chili-chips-ba/openCologne/issues/54) for a more detailed explanation.

### Actual Behavior

Instead the netlist contains an initial block employing a `$write` integrated task, unsupported by PnR, requiring manual modifications of the netlist.
```
 initial begin
    if (1'h1) begin
      $write("Preloading $paramod$76ca5ad6cddf78bc518e7753a546bede55c5cafa\\serving_ram from %s\n", $unsigned(88'h636f72655f34362e686578));
    end
    if (1'h1) begin
      $write("Preloading $paramod$ea5542b74da5d3df7ad0239dce78e365096fcc62\\serving_ram from %s\n", $unsigned(88'h636f72655f33342e686578));
    end
    if (1'h1) begin
      $write("Preloading $paramod$f9cf07300b5f1f0ca052c9602528ae8d7d785ee0\\serving_ram from %s\n",
...
```
